audit: 2026-05-30: Added cross_topic_balanced_p20a/b/c_2026-05-30.json batch (30 Qs across 3 topics + 2 levels: Paeds L3 11, Paeds L4 10, Psych L3 4, Med L3 3, Med L4 2). Per-question deficit-driven cell selection (live matrix recomputed at fire time from prior origin/main with 2186 Qs): Psych L3 had largest initial deficit then Paeds L3+L4 dominated due to slight L2-contamination in Paeds. Clusters: bronchiolitis SpO2 92 to 96%, croup oral dexamethasone, AOM watchful waiting, Kawasaki IVIG resistance 36h, paeds DKA 5-7% deficit over 48h, varenicline first-line, antipsychotic metabolic switch to aripiprazole, sepsis hour-1 bundle MAP 65, macrogol disimpaction, adolescent self-harm admit threshold, gastro ORS 50 mL/kg, asthma child low-to-medium ICS, HSP nephritis urgent renal referral, peritonsillar abscess drainage, eczema methylprednisolone aceponate, valproate teratogenicity pregnancy prevention, ADHD adult specialist initiation, necrotising fasciitis LRINEC 9 meropenem+clindamycin, toddler IDA oral iron 3 to 6 mg/kg, SUFE obligate external rotation, neonatal jaundice phototherapy threshold, infant febrile UTI IV gent+benzylpenicillin, severe bronchiolitis HFNC failure PICU transfer, spiral femur fracture in non-mobile infant mandatory reporting, CF newborn screen sweat chloride, tinea capitis oral terbinafine, paeds headache red-flag MRI, uncomplicated UTI trimethoprim/nitrofurantoin, oseltamivir within 48h, primary spontaneous pneumothorax >2 cm needle aspiration first. Letter dist A=6 B=6 C=6 D=6 E=6; max:min parity ratio <=1.35 across all 30 (worst 1.33). No L5 this batch (algorithm picked L3/L4 deficits first; L5 cells are next priority for upcoming fires). Split 3 files due to MCP payload size.
